title: Oairse Artificial Christmas Garland with Pinecones and Red Berries, 6FT/180cm Realistic Norfolk Pine Hanging Decoration for Fireplace Mantel, Staircase, Doorway, Window, Holiday Indoor Outdoor Décor
features: Realistic Norfolk Pine Design – Crafted with lifelike pine needles, natural textures, and a lush green appearance, this artificial Christmas garland brings the fresh charm of a real pine tree into your home without the mess of falling needles.

Decorated with Pinecones & Red Berries – Pre-decorated with vibrant red berries and lifelike pinecones, this garland adds festive detail and creates a traditional holiday look that enhances any Christmas décor theme.

Durable & Reusable – Made from premium, long-lasting materials, this faux Christmas greenery can be used year after year. The sturdy hanging loop allows easy display on walls, doors, stair railings, mantels, and windows.

Generous Size for Versatile Styling – Measuring 6FT (180cm) in length, this Christmas garland is ideal for framing fireplaces, wrapping around banisters, or hanging above entryways, providing a full and elegant festive accent.

Indoor & Outdoor Holiday Decoration – Whether used as a front door garland, staircase décor, or table centerpiece, this artificial Christmas pine garland instantly transforms your home into a warm, welcoming winter wonderland.
description: Artificial Christmas Garland with Pinecones and Red Berries – The faux Norfolk pine garland showcases lifelike details, giving it a full and realistic look, while it will never wither or shed needles. Pre-decorated with vibrant red berries and natural-looking pinecones, this Christmas garland adds festive charm and seasonal warmth to any setting. The realistic Norfolk pine greenery creates a fresh holiday feel, while the durable hanging loop makes it easy to display over a fireplace mantel, along a staircase railing, above doorways, or around windows. Its versatile design makes it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, instantly transforming your space into a cozy winter wonderland. This reusable artificial Christmas garland is perfect for annual holiday decorating, saving you time and effort while providing an elegant seasonal accent. Whether you use it for your living room, entryway, dining table, or party space, it brings timeless Christmas beauty to your home. Specifications: Length: 6FT / 9FT Material: Plastic, faux pine, berries & pinecones Color: Green with red berries and brown pinecones Quantity: 1pc artificial Christmas garland Note: You can wipe clean with a soft & dry cloth. Please allow 1–2cm difference due to manual measurements. Due to lighting and display settings, actual colors may vary slightly.
